page: Amazon Web Services m8idn.metal-96xl is a bare-metal, general-purpose server instance powered by dedicated Intel x86_64 processors. The system features 192 physical cores and 384 virtual CPUs operating at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. It is equipped with 1536.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per physical core.

This instance includes 22800 GB of local NVMe SSD instance store volumes, providing high-capacity, low-latency local storage. It is optimized for network and Elastic Block Store (EBS) performance, delivering a baseline network bandwidth of 300 Gbps. No GPUs are included in this configuration.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the bare-metal architecture offers high resource density and direct hardware access, which eliminates virtualization overhead. The combination of massive local storage, high-speed networking, and balanced memory-to-CPU ratios makes this server suitable for large-scale databases, data warehousing, enterprise applications, and high-throughput network appliances.
description: Amazon Web Services m8idn.metal-96xl is a bare-metal, general-purpose server powered by dedicated Intel x86_64 processors. It features 384 vCPUs (192 physical cores) running at 3.9 GHz, paired with 1536.0 GB of system memory. The instance is equipped with 22800 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 300 Gbps. Designed without integrated GPUs, this server is optimized for network and EBS performance. The high resource density and direct hardware access of the bare-metal configuration offer qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring high throughput and low latency. This server is suited for large-scale databases, enterprise applications, and high-throughput data processing workloads.
og_description: Amazon Web Services m8idn.metal-96xl is a bare-metal server featuring 384 Intel vCPUs, 1536 GB RAM, 22.8 TB of local NVMe SSD storage, and 300 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services m8idn.metal-96xl is a bare-metal server with 384 Intel vCPUs, 1536 GB RAM, 22800 GB NVMe SSD, and 300 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A bare-metal server featuring three hundred eighty-four virtual CPUs, fifteen hundred gigabytes of memory, and twenty-two terabytes of local NVMe storage.
bullet_points: 384 dedicated Intel vCPUs (192 physical cores) running at 3.9 GHz
1536.0 GB of system memory with a 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
22800 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD instance storage
300 Gbps baseline network bandwidth optimized for EBS
Bare-metal architecture providing direct hardware access without virtualization overhead
Suited for large-scale databases, enterprise applications, and high-throughput network workloads
